Class SVGPathElement.SVGVLineTo

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.ValueBase
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.SVGPathElement
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.SVGPathElement.SVGVLineTo
Enclosing class:
SVGPathElement
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: SVGPathElement.java 977 2022-01-06 11:41:03Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public static final class SVGPathElement.SVGVLineTo extends SVGPathElement
The implementation of the SVG path LineTo element for a vertical line.
Author:
Thomas Thrien - thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org
Version:
$Id: SVGPathElement.java 977 2022-01-06 11:41:03Z tquadrat $

  • Constructor Details

    • SVGVLineTo

      public SVGVLineTo(boolean isAbsolute, double y)
      Creates a new SVGVLineTo instance.
      Parameters:
      isAbsolute - true if the given coordinate is absolute, false if it is relative to the last point on the path.
      y - The y coordinate for the end point of the line.

    • SVGVLineTo

      public SVGVLineTo(boolean isAbsolute, long y)
      Creates a new SVGVLineTo instance.
      Parameters:
      isAbsolute - true if the given coordinate is absolute, false if it is relative to the last point on the path.
      y - The y coordinate for the end point of the line.
